nodes.name: When greenlit (job_id in)
nodes.notes: Called with { job_id }. Workflow A's greenlight reply (or the Telegram/Form injector) triggers this.

parameters.query:
UPDATE jobs SET status='scripted' WHERE id=$1
RETURNING id, type, topic, angle, source_url;

nodes.name: Claude — research (web)
nodes.notes: Mirrors prompts/research.md. web_search tool gives Claude live sourcing.

nodes.name: Claude — script
nodes.notes: Compliance block in the system prompt. Mirrors prompts/script-shorts.md / script-long.md.

nodes.name: Claude — fact-check (fresh)
nodes.notes: FRESH context — no shared state with the writer. Mirrors prompts/factcheck.md.

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='failed', factcheck='FLAG', flags=$2 WHERE id=$1;

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ text: $json.script, model_id: $json.type === 'long' ? 'eleven_multilingual_v2' : 'eleven_flash_v2_5', voice_settings: { stability: 0.5, similarity_boost: 0.75, style: 0.15 } }) }}

nodes.name: ElevenLabs — TTS
nodes.notes: flash for Shorts, multilingual_v2 for long. Returns MP3 binary on the 'audio' property.

nodes.name: Remotion — render
nodes.notes: Calls render/server.js. Long timeout — renders can take minutes.

parameters.query: UPDATE jobs SET status='ready', factcheck='PASS', audio_url=$2, video_url=$3, thumb_url=$4, seo=$5 WHERE id=$1 RETURNING id;

parameters.text:
=✅ *Ready to review*
*{{ $('Evaluate gate').item.json.topic }}*
▶️ {{ $('Remotion — render').item.json.video_url }}

Watch it end-to-end, then Approve to publish on the next slot.

additionalFields.reply_markup: ={{ JSON.stringify({ inline_keyboard: [[ { text: '✅ Approve', callback_data: 'approve:' + $('Evaluate gate').item.json.id }, { text: '❌ Reject', callback_data: 'reject:' + $('Evaluate gate').item.json.id } ]] }) }}
